areaLabel.name: Area Label
areaLabel.hint: The label to display for area measurements (e.g., 'area', 'zone', 'sector')

squareUnitsPerArea.name: Side Length per Area
squareUnitsPerArea.hint: The side length in scene units that equals one area. For example, enter 15 to make a 15×15 ft template = 1 area, or enter 10 to make a 10×10 ft template = 1 area.

visibility.name: Visibility Mode
visibility.hint: When to show the area measurement overlay. 'Always Visible' shows measurements on all templates. 'Only While Editing Templates' shows measurements only when the template tool is active.

roundingMode.name: Rounding Mode
roundingMode.hint: How to round area values. Round (nearest) rounds to the nearest value, Floor (round down) always rounds down, Ceil (round up) always rounds up, Trunc (remove decimal) removes the decimal entirely showing only whole numbers.

textColor.name: Text Color
textColor.hint: Color for the area measurement text (CSS color value)

fontSize.name: Font Size
fontSize.hint: Font size for the area measurement text (in pixels)
